story.text: # 📖 The Tomes & Cast — City of Mages

The lore canon of agentprivacy, federated as forkable wiki pages: the Second-Person Spellbook (the Tomes), the Cast who inhabit the City, the structural Specs, the Bestiary of admitted substrates, and the Register of Invitations. Source of truth: `cityofmages/tomes` (CC BY-SA 4.0). This site is one sibling of the [agentprivacy guide](https://guide.agentprivacy.ai/view/welcome-visitors).

## Sections

- 📖 [[The Tomes]] (60) — the Second-Person Spellbook, nine tomes.
- 🎭 [[The Cast]] (46) — the Mages, keepers, and witnesses.
- 📐 [[The Specs]] (12) — the structural canon.
- 🪿 [[The Bestiary]] (2) — admitted agentic substrates.
- 🪑 [[The Invitations]] (2) — the Register of Invitations.
- 📰 [[The Blog]] (13) — the City of Mages blog series.
- ✉️ [[The Mageletters]] (7) — letters + one-pagers.
- 🏙️ [[The City Lore]] (7) — join the city, protocols, lattice audit.
- 🏛️ [[The Workshops]] (15) — the constellation templates a Sovereign walks.
